name: Eli Yanchevsky
bio: Founder and Head of State. Designed the nation's first passport, visa, ID and driver's license, then sent the email that started a country.

name: Netanel Yanchevsky
bio: Co-Founder and Head of Government. Received the invitation email and said yes, turning a nation of one into a nation of two.

name: Boni
role: National Dog · Guardian of the Realm
bio: Guardian of the Realm by royal decree. Patrols the capital couch, greets every visitor, always majestic.
